title: The Winter Pack
description: When Wren's car dies on a mountain road in a whiteout, the man who pulls her from the snowbank smells like cedar and trouble — and his eyes catch the light wrong. The Halloran pack doesn't take in strangers. But the pack's alpha can't stop looking at her, and the moon is rising. A complete slow-burn werewolf romance about a woman who never asked to be anyone's fate.
